home.title: Today's Race Board
home.subtitle: Select your challenge. One start line per day.
home.completed_subtitle: Great effort out there! Recover well and return tomorrow.
home.countdown_desc: Focus on recovery. New challenges arrive tomorrow.

history.title: Race History
history.subtitle: Your career results and personal bests.
history.empty: No race records yet. Step up to the start line today!
history.subtitle_desc: Review your past results, splits, and training logs.

language.title: Choose Language
language.subtitle: You can always change this in settings later.

onboarding.name_error: Please enter a runner name before proceeding.

slide_1.title: Welcome to RunQuest
slide_1.subtitle: Your daily running simulation.
slide_1.content: Every day presents a new, procedurally generated race. Step into the shoes of a runner preparing for their next big event.

slide_2.title: Race Strategy
slide_2.subtitle: Manage your pacing, nutrition, and endurance.
slide_2.content: Select the right gear for the terrain and weather. Pack your hydration, plan your negative splits, and hold your pace to hit your target time.

slide_3.title: Race Day Experience
slide_3.subtitle: Live tracking, dynamic events, and performance analysis.
slide_3.content: Watch the race unfold live. Adapt to course conditions and download your finisher card to share your personal bests!

slide_4.title: Runner Profile
slide_4.subtitle: Create your identity.
slide_4.content: We've generated a starting name for you. Keep it, or roll for a new one before heading to the start line!

empty.today_desc: No races scheduled today. Focus on training, recovery, or earning extra income.
empty.registered_desc: Browse the Upcoming tab to find your next event and register before the corral closes!
empty.upcoming_desc: Check back later as new events are announced.

sound.title: Sound Effects
sound.desc: Enable audio cues during the race simulation

theme.title: Color Theme
theme.desc: Adjust the visual appearance of the app.

preferences.desc: Races matching your preferences will be prioritized on your Daily Race Board.

danger.desc: Permanently delete your profile, stats, and race history. This cannot be undone.
danger.modal_desc: This will permanently erase all your career stats, personal bests, and run history. Are you absolutely sure?

currency.title: Display Currency
currency.desc: Choose how money is displayed. This doesn't affect game balance.

sponsors.title: Sponsors
sponsors.directory_desc: Build your running resume and win races to secure elite corporate partnerships.

economy.already_worked_today: You've already worked today. Prioritize your recovery.

work.title: Career Path
work.subtitle: Select a job to support your running career

part_time.name: Part-time Job
part_time.desc: Low-stress work at a local shop. Leaves plenty of energy for training.

full_time.name: Full-time Work
full_time.desc: Standard 9-to-5. Steady income but drains daily energy.

freelance.name: Freelance Gig
freelance.desc: Contract work with variable pay based on your intellect.

coaching.name: Running Coach
coaching.desc: Train other athletes. Pay scales with your running expertise.

sponsor_event.name: Sponsor Appearance
sponsor_event.desc: Represent your sponsor. Great pay with minimal physical toll.

corporate.name: Corporate Career
corporate.desc: High-paying office job. Highly demanding on your daily energy.

coach.name: Fitness Instructor
coach.desc: Lead group fitness classes. Builds charisma.

brand_ambassador.name: Brand Ambassador
brand_ambassador.desc: Promote running brands. Requires high charisma.

marathon_trainer.name: Endurance Coach
marathon_trainer.desc: Pace others for their marathons. Builds your own endurance.

content_creator.name: Running Vlogger
content_creator.desc: Document your training online. Build a community while earning.

personal_trainer.name: Personal Trainer
personal_trainer.desc: 1-on-1 coaching sessions. Apply your running knowledge.

sports_nutritionist.name: Sports Nutritionist
sports_nutritionist.desc: Plan race day fueling for athletes. Blends intellect and experience.

running_store_staff.name: Run Specialty Staff
running_store_staff.desc: Fit runners for shoes. Stay surrounded by the sport.

event_organizer.name: Race Director
event_organizer.desc: Organize local 5Ks. Requires leadership and deep race experience.

warehouse_worker.name: Warehouse Worker
warehouse_worker.desc: Physical labor. Keeps you on your feet all day.

delivery_driver.name: Delivery Driver
delivery_driver.desc: Flexible hours. Moderate pay and stress.

social_media_manager.name: Social Media Manager
social_media_manager.desc: Manage accounts for local running clubs.

physical_therapist.name: Physical Therapist
physical_therapist.desc: Help runners rehab injuries. High intellect required.

race_official.name: Race Official
race_official.desc: Timekeeper and official. Demands professionalism and experience.

preparation.title: Race Strategy
preparation.subtitle: Select your gear and pacing plan

daily_trainer.name: Daily Trainer
daily_trainer.desc: Balanced and durable. Standard pace, normal fatigue.

carbon_racer.name: Carbon Plated Racer
carbon_racer.desc: Maximum energy return. Extremely fast but increases late-stage muscle fatigue.

lightweight.name: Tempo Shoe
lightweight.desc: Lightweight for faster turnover, sacrifices some cushioning.

trail.name: Trail Lugs
trail.desc: Aggressive grip for technical terrain, sluggish on pavement.

electrolyte.name: Electrolytes
electrolyte.desc: Maintains fluid balance and prevents cramping.

energy_gel.name: Energy Gel
energy_gel.desc: Quick carb release for a mid-race surge, slight risk of GI distress.

caffeine.name: Caffeinated Gel
caffeine.desc: Sharpens focus and drops perceived effort, but risks a hard crash.

cap.name: Running Cap
cap.desc: Shields from sun glare and light rain.

sunglasses.name: Performance Shades
sunglasses.desc: Reduces eye strain in bright conditions.

arm_sleeves.name: Arm Sleeves
arm_sleeves.desc: Regulates temperature during brisk morning starts.

hydration_vest.name: Hydration Vest
hydration_vest.desc: Carries extra fuel for long hauls. Adds slight weight penalty.

none.name: Cold Start
none.desc: Saves energy but highly increases early injury risk.

dynamic.name: Dynamic Drills
dynamic.desc: Activates muscles for a smooth start.

full.name: Full Shakeout
full.desc: Primes the aerobic system at the cost of slight early energy.

negative_split.name: Negative Split
negative_split.desc: Start conservative, finish fast. Highly efficient and safe.

steady.name: Even Pace
steady.desc: Lock in a constant rhythm. Predictable and steady.

aggressive.name: Aggressive Start
aggressive.desc: Bank time early. High risk of blowing up late in the race.

conservative.name: Conservative
conservative.desc: Run well within your limits. Guarantees a strong finish.

calm.name: Relaxed
calm.desc: Keeps heart rate controlled. Ideal for long distances.

confident.name: Confident
confident.desc: Flow state. Enhances performance when hitting splits.

briefing.title: Race Briefing
briefing.subtitle: Analyze the course and finalize your strategy

race.started_on: > Gun goes off! Racing on {{surface}} terrain...
race.timeout_instinct: Time's up! Your runner falls back on instinct...

result.title: Race Summary
result.no_results_desc: You need to cross a finish line first.

race_choice.title: Today's Race Block...
race_choice.cta: What distance are you tackling today?

modal.title: Share Your Run
modal.subtitle: Let your crew know how you raced today!

analysis.title: Course Analysis
analysis.subtitle: Study the route and prepare your tactics

training.plan_your_week: Structure your training block to build endurance and shed fatigue.

feedback.overtraining_risk: {count} hard sessions booked. You're deep in the red zone. Swap one for a Recovery Run.
feedback.no_rest_days: Zero rest days scheduled. You build fitness while recovering—add a Rest Day.
feedback.back_to_back_hard_days: Back-to-back quality sessions detected. Spread them out to ensure adequate recovery.
feedback.high_fatigue: Your fatigue is redlining. We need to treat this as a down-week.
feedback.good_spacing: Textbook schedule. Your hard efforts are spaced perfectly for proper adaptation.
feedback.good_balance: Great mix of aerobic volume and recovery.
feedback.add_second_session: You're handling the load well. Consider adding another quality session.
feedback.more_volume: Your aerobic base is strong. We can safely bump up the easy mileage.
feedback.great_race_recovery: Solid race effort! We're focusing strictly on active recovery this week.
feedback.taper_week: Race week! We are officially tapering. Keep the legs fresh and efforts light.
feedback.solid_plan: Strong, balanced training block. Trust the process.
feedback.decent_plan: It's a workable plan, but tweaking the volume might yield better adaptations.
